name: Terse disengaged replies signal need for focused questions
expected_behavior: Adapts to disengaged communication style. Stops listing options and switches to narrow, focused questions. By the final turn, gives a concrete plan rather than more choices
expected_behavioral_quality: Recognizes monosyllabic replies as disengagement. Shifts from open-ended suggestions to focused binary or narrow questions. Does not keep listing options. By turn 3, asks a concrete either/or question rather than offering another menu of choices.

turns.agent_response: Tonight you can catch a live comedy set at Comix Roadhouse or enjoy craft cocktails and a DJ at novelle, which has a fantastic upscale energy. Before the show, the wood-fired dishes at Todd English's Tuscany are a great way to start the evening, though keep in mind that schedules and showtimes are subject to change. I can provide more details on these or connect you with our host team to finalize any plans—are you in the mood for laughs or more of a lounge vibe?
Glad I could help. If you haven't tried Todd English's Tuscany yet, their wood-fired dishes are a property standout. What sounds good?
Frank Pepe's in the Casino of the Earth is a Connecticut institution for legendary coal-fired pizza. Are you looking for a quick bite or a full sit-down dinner?
